layout.grid_strategy: Control Room (dense data, tight gaps: gap-4 or gap-6, 1px subtle borders)
layout.surfaces: Grid Borders (Technical Look) + Glassmorphism for sticky elements (bg-slate-950/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10)

components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-slate-800), no shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), border color brightens.
components.buttons: Sharp corners or max 4px radius. High contrast. Primary: bg-white text-slate-950 hover:bg-slate-200. Accent: bg-emerald-600 text-white hover:bg-emerald-500.
components.tables: Data-dense, compact cells, IBM Plex Mono for numbers, tabular-nums utility. Right-align numeric columns. Use subtle row hover states (hover:bg-slate-800/50).
components.vault_tiles: Premium asset tiles. Use abstract navy texture as backdrop. Slab image centered. Subtle inner glow to signify institutional custody.
components.ticker: react-fast-marquee for live price feeds of top traded cards.

motion.page_transitions: Framer Motion fade and slide up.
motion.ticker: Continuous smooth scroll for market prices.
motion.price_update: Pulse animation (emerald/red flash) on price change or trade match.

images.description: Premium bank vault door for secure custody vibes
Elegant smooth dark blue abstract texture for asset tiles and headers

accessibility.contrast_ratio: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for standard text and 3:1 for large text over dark surfaces.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='trade-offer-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a Dark Theme application. Base background is #030712 (deep navy/slate). Text should be #F8F9FA or slate-300.
Import fonts: Playfair Display, Outfit, IBM Plex Mono. Map them in tailwind.config.js to sans, serif, and mono families.
For tabular data (order book, portfolio P&L), use IBM Plex Mono with tabular-nums.
Structure UI similar to a Bloomberg Terminal meeting Robinhood: Dense, technical, dark-mode, minimal padding between data rows.
For cards and containers, do NOT use default soft shadows or heavy radii. Use 1px borders (border-slate-800), flat colors, sharp aesthetics.
The Fair Trade Score should look analytical and authoritative. Use Claude 3.5 Sonnet to generate real-time score evaluations.
Do NOT use placeholder images; use the provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs for slabs and avatars.
Build the Exchange/Order Book with Shadcn tables or dense grid layouts.
